programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica are separating dreams from reality with two buyers with grand plans. They're looking for a palatial pile in the beautiful NSW Southern Highlands for Peter and Grace, but finding the perfect property can prove a little testing. They're also on the hunt on the NSW South Coast for Kerry and Wayne. They've got champagne tastes on a beer budget and it's Veronica's job to convince them you get what you pay for.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: People sell houses for many reasons. Shawnah and Frank, they're selling up to have a baby. The only way this couple can add to their family is through IVF, but without the money from a sale of their Mudgee investment property, their plans are on hold. The house, a pint-size ex milk bar, is the cheapest house in Mudgee. It's on the market for just $180,000 but still nobody wants it. One look at the outside tells you why - it's not a house, it's a box without a single redeeming feature. The team will really have to think outside the box to fix this one.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Taking that first step on the property ladder can be tough. So tough that many young couples can't do it without a leg up from mum and dad. Amanda Baxter was lucky enough to have stepdad Wayne when she and her partner wanted to buy a home for themselves and the kids. In fact, they were so lucky Wayne stumped up 50 percent of the mortgage payments. But when Amanda and her partner split, they could no longer afford the repayments. Wayne now wants to retire, so the whole family needs their money out. The house is in the respectable Perth suburb of Hamersley. But animal lover Amanda treats it more like a city farm. The dogs have dug up the yard, the chickens roost in the house, and the cats roam as they please. Amanda and her children are perfectly happy living in pets' paradise; buyers, on the other hand, find the whole thing a bit on the nose.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sisters Maria and Sonia reluctantly put their family's Edwardian bungalow in Fitzroy North on the market, hoping to leave a legacy for their children.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Chris had just finished building his dream home in Callignee, Victoria, when it was burnt to the ground in the Black Saturday bushfires. Will Chris be able to rebuild his new fire-resistant home and his life as well?

programme.title: Wild Homes with George Clarke
programme.desc: George Clarke travels to remote Lord Howe Island. He explores a multigenerational renovation, a coastal retreat and dives into an ocean paradise with friendly turtles.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in High Wycombe where Carly and Phil are at deadlock over their four-bed semi. Eight years after buying their once roomy home, life is somewhat different with three young daughters.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit Wendy and Simon in Derbyshire with two kids and three studios. They catch up with Steph and Tana in Edinburgh with baby Marcus.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: The first time Brendan Moran saw his north Bondi block, it was so steep and inaccessible he didn't bother getting out of the car. But wife Penny was undeterred. She saw the potential in the awkward L-shaped, battle-axe block. Despite being hemmed in on all sides by surrounding houses and with just one skinny laneway in, they reckoned they could squeeze all they needed for them and their four kids on this block by simply going up. Four levels should do it, rising 14m in the air with an infinity edge pool, and they're pushing building regulations to get it all in. But excavating this ex-quarry is more complicated than they think. In fact, every stage of the build is hampered by the challenges of the block. It's so tight there's nowhere for the tradies to put anything, and keeping peace with the neighbours is a full-time job. With builder and mentor Martin at the helm, Penny dons the work boots and hard hat, and gets on the tools. Her passion is building and she's all over the intricacies of the build as she juggles her life as a tradie with being a mum. After a family holiday to Thailand, she and Brendan return refreshed and inspired to make substantial structural changes they say will make their house even better. From changing the entire entrance to lifting ceiling heights and redesigning the pool to make it even longer and deeper, the complexity of this construction would challenge even the most seasoned builders. After numerous council applications and changes that blow their bank balance, and schedule, right out of the water, their spontaneous decision-making threatens to spiral out of control. As costs soar into the millions, there's no guarantee how or when this multi-tiered tower will ever get done.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sisters Maria and Sonia reluctantly put their family's Edwardian bungalow in Fitzroy North on the market, hoping to leave a legacy for their children.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Ange and Sonia bought their home in a rush. Ange suffers buyers remorse while Sonia loves it. Neale must turn Ange around while Andrew convinces Sonia to move.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: RTS award winning documentary moves outside London to Queens Medical Centre Nottingham, one of Europes busiest A and E departments, where life, love and loss unfold daily.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers weigh in on I'm a Celebrity, Squid Game: The Challenge, All Her Fault, Celebrity Race Across the World, Picture Slam, Knife Edge and Emmerdale.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: Top TV including Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Love & Death, and Sex Education.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: On the 'Box this time: Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Love Is Blind and Boiling Point.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: Features Big Brother: The Launch, Don't Look Down for SU2C, and Antiques Roadshow.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey and her team help Toyah and Ron transform their family home. In the warehouse, the family go through 521 odd socks, 75 Barbies and 28 games controllers.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: People sell houses for many reasons. Shawnah and Frank, they're selling up to have a baby. The only way this couple can add to their family is through IVF, but without the money from a sale of their Mudgee investment property, their plans are on hold. The house, a pint-size ex milk bar, is the cheapest house in Mudgee. It's on the market for just $180,000 but still nobody wants it. One look at the outside tells you why - it's not a house, it's a box without a single redeeming feature. The team will really have to think outside the box to fix this one.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In the grand finale, the three finalists face their ultimate challenges: making delicate opera gloves, transforming party items into outfits, and draping a full outfit on a model.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the quarterfinal and the potters face the introspective challenge of creating a self-sculpture and building their own sawdust kilns. Who will secure a place in the semifinal?

programme.desc: On the farm of former Emmerdale star Kelvin Fletcher and his family in the Peak District as they open up their world to celebrate and explore their wonderful farming life.

Doctors use psilocybin to help terminally ill patients, discovering ancient wisdom on death and traditional medicines during their Amazon journey.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter

programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when former bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.desc: A headstrong girl moves to rural Japan with her grandfather, a monk. She forms an unlikely friendship with an unpredictable supernatural cat guardian.

programme.desc: A rebellious student and a perfectionist overachiever form an unlikely alliance in the race for student body president, discovering unexpected feelings as competition heats up.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: In the summer of 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the center of a public scandal and the family faces financial trouble.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: The Parenting
programme.desc: Boyfriends Rohan and Josh plan a perfect weekend getaway in the country to introduce their parents. But as tensions begin to flare between the more traditional Sharon and Frank, and the laid-back Liddy and Cliff, the families soon realise that their rental, managed by eccentric local Brenda, is haunted by the presence of a 400-year-old poltergeist. When one parent becomes thoroughly possessed, it's up to the young couple and their meddlesome BFF Sara to unite the families and stop the evil entity once and for all.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Stranded in a remote town with no escape, Maya faces another terrifying night as three ruthless killers return to hunt. To survive, she must end their murderous spree.

programme.title: The Idaho Student Murders
programme.desc: Explores the real - life horror that occurred in the idyllic town of Moscow, Idaho, where criminology student Bryan Kohberger faced four first-degree murder charges and the death penalty for the murder of four University students.

programme.title: Shoshana

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: The Great Wall

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: When a powerful threat looms over Berk, Hiccup and his dragon Toothless must lead Vikings and dragons toward a united future before everything they know is lost.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn Carnahan discover the lost city of Hamunaptra, and struggle to save the world from unspeakable evil after they inadvertently stumble upon a mummy's tomb in 1923, and the mummy is accidentally resurrected.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness, Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's monster.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: When California girl Susan Murphy is clobbered by space gunk on her wedding day, she mysteriously grows to 49-feet-11-inches tall. The military puts her into a secret government compound, renamed Ginormica and hold her captive along with a ragtag group of Monsters: the brilliant but insect-headed Dr Cockroach, Ph.D.; the macho half-ape, half-fish, The Missing Link; the gelatinous and indestructible B.O.B.; and the 350-foot grub, Insectosaurus. But when a wild and dangerous alien robot lands on Earth, The President enlists this motley crew to save the world from imminent destruction.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family voyage on a luxury monster cruise ship so he can take a summer vacation from providing everyone else's vacation at the hotel, and the rest of Drac's Pack cannot resist tagging along. The monsters are all having a great time, indulging in all of the shipboard fun the cruise has to offer, from monster volleyball to colossus sized buffets and exotic excursions, but then the unexpected happens as Drac falls for the intriguing-yet-dangerous captain of the ship. Balancing family, friends, and a budding romance might just be too much, even for the most powerful vampire.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: Get ready for a gut-busting, bone-mashing good time in this hilarious horror comedy. There comes a day in every man's life when he has to get off the couch and kill some zombies. When flesh-eating zombies are on the hunt for a bite to eat, it's up to slacker Shaun and his best pal to save their friends and family from becoming the next entree.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness, Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's monster.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: This film follows devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon as he butts heads with a brash new recruit. Together, they uncover a local criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay. For a generation of TV fans the world over, the name Baywatch conjures up images of sun, surf and statuesque lifeguards, running in slow-motion in form-fitting red swimsuits.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Misfit NYPD detectives, Gamble and Hoitz, are sentenced to life behind the desk. They hate each other and the monotony of their meaningless jobs, as they're forced to live in the shadow of the two biggest and most badass cops on the force. But when those guys go down for the count, opportunity knocks for Gamble and Hoitz. Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can the other guys step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement (Billy Bob Thornton) and a professional assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story. A group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement (Billy Bob Thornton) and a professional assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Drew Barrymore reunite again since starring in THE WEDDING SINGER. Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss so every night all memory of her day is erased. But a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Gwen and Eddie are 'America's Sweethearts' - the country's favourite couple, on-screen and off, but when their very public romance turns into a very private break-up, only veteran press agent Lee and Gwen's assistant, Kiki, can help Gwen and Eddie show some love while they promote their last film together. The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Tim Lake discovers he can travel in time. The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life - so he decides to make his world a better place by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary. They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too. This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Gwen and Eddie are 'America's Sweethearts' - the country's favourite couple, on-screen and off, but when their very public romance turns into a very private break-up, only veteran press agent Lee and Gwen's assistant, Kiki, can help Gwen and Eddie show some love while they promote their last film together. The press junket is in a resort hotel miles from anywhere, and while Lee and Kiki frantically try to keep the media away from the real story - and keep Gwen and Eddie from revealing their secret - Kiki finds something entirely unexpected.

That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Giant-haired Dolly Parton is Truvy, the owner of the beauty parlour that serves as the town's unofficial hub. Dropping in to exchange gossip are Ouiser, the richest and meanest woman in town, and Clairee, an elegant widow with a sly delivery. The atmosphere is further enlivened by the wacky new girl, Annelle, a gawky trainee with cat-woman glasses and a mysterious past. These six 'steel magnolias' huddle together and provide each other with strength, friendship and an audience for each other's jokes as they negotiate the ups and downs of life and love in a small Southern town.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Tripp is a 35-year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him? It's free, he's got a great room, and mum does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little push. They just didn't expect Tripp would push back!

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: In this poignant and often hilarious film a wedding is about to take place in Chinquapin, Louisiana. Bride Shelby is a headstrong young beauty whose iron-willed mother, M'Lynn, would do anything for her. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets, and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis involving dysfunctional party girl, Jules, forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: Advice to Love By
programme.desc: When a love advice author and a dating columnist cross paths, attraction blooms into more. Using strategies from their own playbooks, it's possible they've met their match: each other.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley Valentine, a wisecracking, completely unpredictable English housewife who proves it's never too late to recapture your dreams. Bored with her suburban life, Shirley takes a chance on adventure when her friend invites her on a vacation to Greece. Within no time she's back to her rebellious teenage roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Struggling to make sense of life after college, seven friends trade lovers, secrets, and yada-yadas at their favourite college hang-out, until a final crisis involving dysfunctional party girl, Jules, forces them out of the nest.

programme.title: And So It Goes

But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley Valentine, a wisecracking, completely unpredictable English housewife who proves it's never too late to recapture your dreams. Bored with her suburban life, Shirley takes a chance on adventure when her friend invites her on a vacation to Greece. Within no time she's back to her rebellious teenage roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Will Graham is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr Hannibal Lecter. Years later, after a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham reluctantly agrees to come out of retirement and assist in a mysterious case. But he soon realises that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Gerry Conlon is one of four men coerced into signing false confessions for the IRA bombing of the Guildford pub that killed five people. His father is also unjustly charged and imprisoned with his son. Gerry spends 14 years in prison trying to prove his innocence and clear his family's name with the help of a British lawyer. Adapted from Conlon's autobiography Proved Innocent.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. programme.title: The Woman King

Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith, whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie must learn the ropes of instant parenthood when they bring in three foster children. Inspired by a true story, discover this must-see family comedy from the creators of Daddy's Home.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: From acclaimed filmmaker Robert Eggers, the writer-director behind "The Witch," comes a spellbinding and atmospheric drama about a pair of lighthouse keepers on a desolate New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Having lost his memory and the one person he loved, Bourne is forced to hunt down his past in order to find a future. Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As a historic heatwave roasts the swamp, hunters unleash bold new strategies, Troy Landry relies on his swamp ingenuity to find the coolest water in the bayou.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Detroit, Rick suits up in samurai armour, checks luxury cars, and explores Motown memorabilia.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: This season, we have the pleasure of welcoming Emily Wears, a 27-year-old auctioneer from Solon, Iowa. Emily has over 10 years of auctions under her belt and is trying to grow her business by branching out to the west coast. She turns heads with her uniqueness and immediately makes waves by dispensing with the usual "Going once! Going twice!" and selling the locker at her own pace. Emily gives us a taste of what this auction world looks like through the eyes of an outsider. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start; Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager (if unprepared) pupil; while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders this season is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put: Kenny is magic. In this episode, Jarrod finds the party locker he's always wanted; Rene discovers a new mobile business opportunity; Ivy's footwear makes a huge impact.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: A salvage maestro returns to raise more valuable tropical hardwood, trying not to wreck his own boat in the process. It's the moment of truth in the multi-million-dollar operation to salvage America's biggest shipwreck.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Determined to get gators from the warm waters to the buyers as fast as possible, Willie snipes every gator he sees, but his son demands his own shot.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. This time, Kenny brings his unique hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put, Kenny is magic. In this episode, Mary's locker brings out her inner voice, Kenny tries to clothe America, and Brandi and Jarrod get a leg up on the competition.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: On the Day Crew, the rig's worm, Cheston, finally gets in the good graces of his hot-headed driller, Pee Wee. The two find common ground just long enough for Cheston to get a promotion. But as he will soon find out: with the new position comes new dangers. The nervous worm will have to use everything he's learned if he expects to keep his fingers intact. On the Night Crew, driller Ron Pane is finding his hulking roughneck Tank's attitude harder to manage. As the ex-prize fighter is forced into scrubbing duty, Tank's ego is pushed to the edge. But hurt feelings are the least of Ron's problems.

programme.desc: Host Ronny Chieng interviews filmmaker Bao Nguyen, promoting Netflix documentary "BTS: The Return."
